appUnderTest.note: Application under test. Credentials (TIM1_USERNAME / TIM1_PASSWORD) are read from workspace-root .env.local since Phase 0 Step 0.C — they are no longer in this file.

focusedRun.note: The legacy POC focuses on TestRail Run 175.

filter.label: pepi
filter.note: Within run 175, only cases tagged 'pepi' are executed.

playwright.note: Playwright runs only tests carrying the @pepi tag in the title or describe.
